decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id 'project_hylan-blvd-transportation-improvement-study', which matches the existing registry record with the same name, source (2012_03_15_brt_hylan_meeting_slides), and description. No new registry record is needed.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Hylan Boulevard Corridor Transportation Improvement Study
Improve traffic flow ■ Reduce bus travel time and improve reliability ■ Improve transit access to Manhattan, Brooklyn, and Staten Island destinations ■ Improve safety for all corridor users
